candidates.promptText:
[Prompt - Japanese/Kyoto Cherry Blossoms - Condé Nast Traveler style]
A breathtaking scene of a serene Japanese garden and ancient temple pagoda in Kyoto, Japan, during peak April cherry blossom (벚꽃) season. A few stylish, minimal travelers are strolling peacefully. The composition captures the traditional architecture of Kiyomizu-dera conceptually surrounded by a stunning cascade of delicate pink and white blossoms against a soft, minimal, warm morning light. Condé Nast Traveler style. High-resolution photo. Soft-minimal mood. (Use for '글로벌 안목' card in Overseas Travel section).
Korean local landscape or urban depth, seasonal atmosphere, discovery and warmth, editorial travel style, no text no watermark, center composition breathing room 봄의 산뜻함과 연한 색감.

A professional editorial photograph capturing an active collaborative exchange during an institutional visit for an overseas training program, building upon the scene in image_14.png. A diverse group of five professionals (2-3 Koreans, 2-3 other nationalities, with distinct and stylishly varied business casual attire such as light blazers, patterned shirts, knits, dresses, all different) are gathered around a natural light-wood meeting table. The composition is shifted slightly to make symbolic elements more prominent, with participants engaged but placed more towards the background. On a clean wall panel near the background screen, two small, symbolic flags are mounted side-by-side: on the left, the South Korean Taegeukgi, and on the right, a generalized 'Global Partner Nation' flag. The large screen displays "Global Leadership Program" text with an exchange symbol (handshake and connected globes) and abstract data visualizations (no readable text). Participants look towards the screen, creating an engaged atmosphere. Abundant soft, diffused natural daylight comes from floor-to-ceiling windows on one side, looking out upon soft green foliage and blurry spring blossoms (light pinks, yellows). The central upper-middle area is intentionally clear of clutter for future text overlay, framed by the screen and windows. High quality, realistic photo, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermarks. (16:9 format).
